/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/orchestrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/dataset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/visualizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/networkRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/lossRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visual_test.dir/src/displayRenderer.cpp.o -o visual_test  libs/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
